assertions.title: Guest workloads cannot reach host control-plane surfaces

steps.action: SSH to Node B and check for Firecracker process
Attempt to ping guest VM at 172.2.0.2
Attempt HTTP health check to guest sandbox port 8085

steps.expected: Running VM with active Firecracker process
steps.observed: VM state exists (fc-config.json, epoch=1) but no running process

evidence.network: ping 172.2.0.2 -> Destination Host Unreachable; curl http://172.2.0.2:8085/health -> failed

assertions.issues: Guest VM is not running - Firecracker process not found, guest network unreachable. Cannot test control-plane isolation without a running guest.

assertions.title: Firecracker guest images are built from the repo on Node B

steps.expected: Files match go-choir-guest-image nix store paths

steps.action: Verify kernel is valid ELF binary

assertions.title: Provider secrets are absent from the guest VM

steps.observed: No firecracker process - VM not running

steps.action: Document secrets present on host for comparison
steps.observed: gateway-provider.env and sandbox-gateway-token.env exist on host at /var/lib/go-choir/

steps.action: Attempt to SSH/exec into guest VM

assertions.issues: Cannot verify secrets are absent from guest because the guest VM is not running. Host-side secrets documented for comparison once guest is accessible.

blockers.description: Firecracker VM guest is not running - no firecracker process found, guest IP (172.2.0.2) unreachable, guest sandbox port 9000/8085 not listening. Host shows sandbox on 8085 but this is host sandbox, not guest VM.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified VM state files exist at /var/lib/go-choir/vm-state/ but Firecracker process is not running. vmctl shows active_vms: 2 but processes not present.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-VM-010: guest images are repo-built), 2 blocked (VAL-VM-007, VAL-VM-011: guest VM not running). The guest images are verified to be from Nix store (bit-for-bit matches), but the Firecracker VM is not currently running so guest-side assertions cannot be tested.
